strengths: 20 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets and exceeds the 15-year minimum
Recent direct AI/agent work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks signals genuine builder engagement with modern AI tooling
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and community-building instincts via GISCollective founding, conference talks, and self-organized workshops
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or ML; education is a BS in Computer Science and an unrelated Fine Arts degree, falling short of the preferred Master's/PhD in an AI-related field
AI experience is shallow in depth and short in duration — approximately 6 months at re:cinq — with no record of recognized AI products, platforms, or published research at scale

Currently in an active career gap with no director-level IC or strategic customer advisory experience visible in the history, creating a seniority mismatch for a role that requires influencing executive and partner audiences
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine technical range and a builder mindset that aligns with the role's emphasis on hands-on fluency, and his recent foray into MCP and agentic infrastructure shows he is actively engaging with the AI wave. However, the role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized AI expertise, a track record advising strategic customers, and the ability to inspire at an organizational scale — none of which are evidenced in his history. His AI exposure is recent and shallow, his seniority ceiling appears to be staff/senior individual contributor, and an active career gap compounds the risk. He would be a strong candidate for a senior AI platform engineer position, but is not yet positioned for the strategic scope this role demands.
